customer_name: Shasta Wildlife Rescue And Rehabilitation Inc
customer_addr:
3752 Rupert Road
PO Box 1173
Anderson, CA 96007

citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
At the time of inspection, the last visit to the premises by the attending veterinarian was October of 2024 and the facility
representative confirmed that they have been working with a new veterinarian. The formal consulting arrangements shall
include a written program of veterinary care and regularly scheduled visits to the premises of the exhibitor.
Correct by 9 March 2026

The larger water pools were the only source of water in the enclosures for the birds and were no longer clean and sanitary
with brown debris visible. Water receptacles must be kept clean and sanitized in accordance with 3.158 as often as
necessary to keep them clean and free of contamination.
Correct by 9 March 2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.40(a)(1) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
At the time of inspection, the last visit to the premises by the attending veterinarian was October of 2024 and the facility 
representative confirmed that they have been working with a new veterinarian. The formal consulting arrangements shall 
include a written program of veterinary care and regularly scheduled visits to the premises of the exhibitor. 
 
Correct by 9 March 2026 
3.156 
   
Watering 
The larger water pools were the only source of water in the enclosures for the birds and were no longer clean and sanitary 
with brown debris visible. Water receptacles must be kept clean and sanitized in accordance with 3.158 as often as 
necessary to keep them clean and free of contamination. 
 
Correct by 9 March 2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative. 
 
 n
